creator: dev@submerge.ch
text:
Created attachment 241463
devel/qtcreator: Update to 10.0.0 release

Update tested on amd64, 13.1-RELEASE and now 13.2-RELEASE. I had one crash at first startup, but can't reproduce it. I've been using QtCreator 10.0.0 on a daily basis now for about two weeks, with no further crashes or regressions.
